Off Calendar Jun-21-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
Vivian Lerche, Esq. specially appearing for the plaintiff. At the request of plaintiff's counsel, the Court ordered the case dismissed with prejudice. Judge: SUZANNE BOLANOS; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.
